suggestions: Calibrate L3 green-light threshold to allow a small fraction of trades based on historical performance.
Integrate HVR to actively investigate Flash high-impact scores and produce signals for L1.
flash_findings: Flash scored high-impact items on one day but downstream stages (HVR, L1) failed to validate them.
l1_findings: L1 grades are uniformly low (D/E) and quadrant is always observe_skip, providing no actionable direction.
l2_l3_findings: L2/L3 green-light rate is 0% (all red), indicating an overly restrictive filter blocking all candidates.
red_team_findings: Red Team generated challenges only on the day with Flash activity, but with no trades, correlation with outcomes is unverifiable.
resonance_findings: Resonance consistently fails (DSR=0.50, PBO=1.00, passed=False), suggesting a static threshold that never met.
decision_findings: Decision stage shows 100% no-trade rate, indicating paralysis caused by upstream filters.
